paper_title: Greenhouse Data Analysis and Experimental Procedures

methods.description: Analysis of the impact of water availability on plant fitness measures and the pollen-to-seed relationship using statistical models.

steps.description: We first analysed the overall impact of water availability on four fitness measures averaged by plant identity.
steps.searchable_summary: perform ANOVA on fitness measures with water treatment as a fixed factor

steps.description: Normality of the residuals was tested with the Shapiro-Wilks test.
steps.searchable_summary: test residuals for normality using Shapiro-Wilks test

steps.description: We then analysed how water treatment affected the pollen-to-seed relationship using piecewise regression analyses.
steps.searchable_summary: perform piecewise regression analysis on pollen-to-seed data

steps.description: The 'segmented' function in the 'segmented' package was used to run the piecewise regression model.
steps.searchable_summary: use 'segmented' package to run piecewise regression

steps.description: The 'davies.test' function was used to determine whether the change in slope was significant.
steps.searchable_summary: use 'davies.test' to check significance of slope change

steps.description: We used two linear mixed models to determine if water treatment influenced the b1 and b2 slope.
steps.searchable_summary: run linear mixed models to test water treatment effect on slopes

steps.description: A linear mixed model was also used to test whether the second slope differed significantly from zero.
steps.searchable_summary: test if second slope is significantly different from zero using mixed model

steps.description: Our second approach was to use a general linear mixed model to analyse seed number of individual flowers.
steps.searchable_summary: use general linear mixed model for seed number analysis

methods.method_name: Greenhouse Stigma Collection and Pollen Count
methods.description: Collection of stigmas and counting of pollen to relate to flower identification and calculate plant fitness measures.

steps.description: Stigmas were collected in a microcentrifuge vial after 48 h of hand-pollination.
steps.searchable_summary: collect stigmas in microcentrifuge vial post hand-pollination

steps.description: Pollen on the stigma slide was counted and related to its flower identification number.
steps.searchable_summary: count pollen on stigma slide and relate to flower ID

steps.description: Fruits were harvested at the time of ripening, and seeds were counted and weighed.
steps.searchable_summary: harvest fruits, count and weigh seeds

steps.description: Seeds were separated from fruit tissue and weighed together for each fruit.
steps.searchable_summary: separate seeds from fruit tissue and weigh

steps.description: Seed mass (per seed) was calculated as total seed mass by number of seeds per fruit.
